edit_summary: Round-1 findings addressed: (1) AC-005 now states the two-reviewer aggregation rule (both reviewers must be free of Critical/Major FAIL; NEEDS_WORK before round 3, BLOCKED at round 3, round-3 Minor-only passes with warningCount); (2) added AC-015/TEST-015 multi-context conformance coverage and AC-016/TEST-016 update-mode semantics with clarified Main Workflow item 2; (3) added AC-017/TEST-017 covering the panelist-unavailable failure mode (panelist-unavailable recorded, requires_human_decision set, no auto-continue)
